name: The Hyakujushi Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Hyakujushi Bank, Ltd. primarily engages in banking activities in Japan. It operates through two segments, Banking and Leasing. The Banking segment provides deposits, loans, marketable securities and related investment services, and foreign currency exchange services. The Leasing segment is involved in leasing and other operations. As of March 31, 20120, it operated 125 offices, including 99 branches, 21 sub-branches, 1 quick square, and 4 consulting plaza. The company was founded in 1878 and is headquartered in Takamatsu, Japan.
